response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and modern web technologies. However, his primary expertise lies in Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, and D, with limited recent C++ experience. His background does not align closely with the industrial automation or C++-heavy requirements of the role, though his security mindset and architectural contributions could be valuable.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated through diverse projects and open-source contributions
Experience with performance-critical systems and concurrent programming (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling)
Security awareness and adherence to best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, secure development methodologies)
concerns: Limited C++ experience in recent years, with no clear focus on C++/STL or industrial automation domains
No direct exposure to IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards as required by the role
Lack of cloud platform experience (e.g., Microsoft Azure) and industrial protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA)
